scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @zform/api" "npm run dev -w @zform/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @zform/shared && npm run build -w @zform/api && npm run build -w @zform/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @zform/shared && npm run typecheck -w @zform/api && npm run typecheck -w @zform/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @zform/shared && npm run test -w @zform/api
